GLADIUS-DRAGON_AURA_POWER.description:
Increases Attack damage by 20% per [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold].
Lose 1 [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold] whenever you play an Attack or at the end of your turn.
GLADIUS-DRAGON_AURA_POWER.smartDescripti:
Increases Attack damage by [blue]{TotalBonus}%[/blue].
Lose 1 [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold] whenever you play an Attack or at the end of your turn.
GLADIUS-DRAGON_AURA_POWER.title: Dragon Aura
